title: Short in brand new auxiliary wire. Bummer!
text:
Purchased this on May 10th but due to mail forwarding issues, I'm just trying it out for the first time.
The packaging is sleek. The headphones are packed in a soft black case and included are an AUX wire & a USB wire.
Unfortunately the AUX wire has a short in it affecting the sound quality. I got brief moments of clarity where I can tell the sound quality is decent, however not long enough to make a judgment.
I'm going to continue testing its performance and will update my review.
For now, it would be a good purchase but a short in a brand new wire is never a good thing.

title: Great headphones (for the money.)
text: These are great headphones for what you pay for them. If you are looking for something to compete with Beats or Bose, you don't have a good grip on reality. These are less than $25. They are very light weight and almost entirely of plastic. I bought them because I am an early riser in a small house. With these and a Bluetooth transmitter on our TV, I can watch TV without disturbing my wife's sleep. Their sound quality is fine for that use. These might not stand up to rough use by kids.

title: Terrible audio.
text:
I researched reasonably priced earphones and finally put these on my Christmas "Wish List" and my wife of 50 years obliged. Fortunately I could blame her selection on myself, so there were no hurt feelings when I exchanged them for a set of even cheaper earbuds after less than a week of trying to make them work.

The main problem was that everything coming through the speakers sounded like I was underwater; very dull with a very narrow sound range heavy on the bass. As the battery began to lose its charge it was even difficult to understand spoken words coming through the phones.

The second issue was that the charge didn't last; they could be charged up overnight, but after 3 or 4 hours the "low battery" warning would begin to interrupt whatever I was doing. And it's not a gentle reminder; more like a claxon or a very loud busy signal on the old land-line phones.

I got these because I was tired of dealing with the wire from my computer speaker jack t

title: Wow..
text:
UPDATE:: still working still fabulous. Ordered another pair. My daughter took mine.

Edit: one month in still loving these! Comfort, yes, sound quality? Yes. Charging? Yes. Volume? Appropriate. For the price? Not bad at all!!

Yea so I expected so little from these cheap headphones. The bass and sound quality far exceeds my expectation. Even if they only last a few months the $25 I paid is well with it! I have purchased several headphones from Amazon for much more money and either the bass was weak or the volume was very low. I’m so pleased with these.

Edit: 1.5 years later. Still working fantastically !! One side broke so it is duct taped, but these are for home use and the sound quality and charging work the same.

title: Loving these
text:
I bought these for two reasons. One was because you can add the wire to them and make them into a wired set of headphones. The other was for the noise canceling. I am currently having ear problems and I wanted something that could do both. I am going on a trip soon and figured having a set of headphones you can use wired or Bluetooth was a great idea. That way when I'm on the plane I can listen to music with the wire and when I land I can use them Bluetooth.

One thing I didn't expect was that you can use the wire with them off. I mean you can have them dead and still use the wire to listen to music. I have done this a few time because I wanted something comfortable and when I used them and killed the battery it nice to continue to use them.

I'm really loving how comfortable they are. I haven't stopped using them yet. They are very light I don't feel any weight on them.

A bonus to me was getting the case with them. I keep them in there when I'm not using

title: Awful
text: These were just....not good. In any way. I took them right out of the box and they were just awful. I wanted to use them for video calls and I couldn't even stand them for a couple minutes. Was very disappointed. I knew I couldn't expect much for the price point, but even then...

title: Don't waste your time or money.
text:
I purchased these based upon reviews I had read about these headphones on Amazon. Wanted something that sounded great and worked effectively to cancel extemporaneous noise. Something I could use on an upcoming flight and cruise. So I ordered a pair.
Well once received, I was anxious to plug them in and try them out playing tunes from my iPhone. My first impression was that they were uncomfortable. Couldn't get them to fit or sit just right. My next impression was connecting them to my iPhone 11. It has to be noted here that these headphones do not come with the correct cable for connecting to an iPhone 11. You must add your own adapter.
Fortunately I came prepared and had the adapter needed connected to a pair of Ear Candy ear buds I had been using.
Plugged in and ready to go, I found the sound quality terrible. Music sounded like it was being played, or listened to, through cotton balls stuffed into each ear. Very low volume and muffled even at the highest volume settin

title: Decent pair of headphones
text:
[[VIDEOID:3bc42c43b465f66a352c6a313bb51f01]] These are decent if u are just looking to listen to music. Yes you can talk on the phone with people but it won't sound too good but it plays music beautifully.
It comes with a cord to charge but you need to supply the base.

title: Good for price
text: They came on time, nice case, no plug but comes with charger cord, sound is AMAZING for the price. My only gripe is maybe just me because I have sensory issues...they actual ear pieces are small. I usually like something that's big enough to cover my ears and not rest on them, these cover my ears but touch them all the way around. It's fine tho because the bass is on point 👌 makes up for it. Lol

title: Over all good but
text:
[[VIDEOID:18f5605e96c5fd5231c59fc4c40c99d2]] It’s a good set of headphones I was torn on picking up a New pair of Beats but because of the price and amount of use and what I planned on using it them for I decided to go cheaper. I do some traveling and when on a airplane my AirPod Pros bother me for long flights. I needed something that can go over the ear and can be wired and wireless. Also something that I wouldn’t be mad if they got lost or broke during a layover or in the commotion of changing flights. So I figured I would give this setup a chance.

Pros
The price you can’t beat it
Compact folds up
Comes with a carrying case
Loud and crisp with micro sd card playback
Wired
Wireless
Micro sd card compatible
Shows Battery lvl on iPhone see pictures

Cons
Distorts at higher volumes when on Bluetooth
Looks to be cheep I feel I have to be careful when folding to put away
Bass lvls aren’t as punchy when on Bluetoot

title: didn’t last long, great customer service
text:
These headphones worked great. I liked how they sounded, sat on my ears, and the battery lasts a while. Unfortunately they barely lasted a month before breaking. I was the only user of them and made sure my son couldn’t get his hands on them. If they weren’t on my ears they were around my neck or put away in their case, so I know they were never being bent the wrong way.

Update: I emailed the company and told them what happened. They sent me a replacement pair almost immediately.

title: Not a very good product
text: [[VIDEOID:9ed8025666c5c2640b1d887b3c5dc3a4]] The volume isn't very loud, even when you have the volume turned all the way to the max.

title: I wasted my money and more importantly my time.
text:
I bought these headphones to watch TV and listen to it via bluetooh, but they have a delay in the voice, that is, I see the gestures in the mouths of the characters, but the sound takes more than a second to reproduce in the hearing aid.
I thought it could be the bluetooth transmitter, but I have tried using a bluetooth receiver and connecting the hearing aid via cable to it and that way I do not perceive any delay.
So in view of the bluetooh signal it is correct and it is not the one that generates the delay.
I contacted customer service and it really was a waste of time. So I consider wasted time and money spent.

title: Great sound, volume control & noise cancellation.
text:
Loved the Black Friday pricing and quality.
The noise control is good. Yet sound is clear as well as volume. Love the colors

title: Returned
text: Ended up returning the headphones due to a constant buzzing. When listening to loud music it was a little more faint but still there. It seemed to only happen in the Bluetooth mode and not when plugged in but that defeats the purpose of the headphones!

title: These headphones  are amazing
text: These headphones  are really  easy to  use  and  are super  comfortable

title: Comfortable * Beautiful * True Sound * Quality
text: These beautiful headphones are comfortable (even with most of my earrings on!) and they have worked reliably just as described ~~ quality sound, easy to use controls (after a little learning 😉) and easy Bluetooth connecting with all devices I’ve used them with… I Love the sturdy case ~~ have traveled extensively with the headphones inside and there’s even some extra room for a cube and extra cord. Hold a charge Very Well and also simple to charge ~~ No problems at all with that!! The ear pieces are Very Comfortable on my ears.  They don’t block sound “entirely”, but well enough to use with tv and/or other conversations in the room simultaneously and I can still be enjoying an audible book, podcast or music.  Definitely Great Value for the money. RECOMMENDED!!

title: Over one's hearing aids perfect fit.
text: I ordered these because I can no longer wear earbuds. I wear hearing aids, so...  No room for both.  I used them this morning 😊 OMGogh perfect!! I even left my TV volume up, bluetooth connection was simple. I Love these headphones. They are also the first pair that actually fit me as they should. If you're looking for a new headphone set, you will be satisfied completely with these.  I highly recommend these if you want a great set for a good price, easy set up, noise control and cancellation. Great sound quality that won't break your bank.

title: Head band piece very uncomfortable
text: The head bands was so uncomfortable - no cushion at all. It like like their is a soft cushion but there isn't. I didn't even bother turning them on.

title: Comfortable and very affordable!
text: Bought for a long flight and they were perfect!

title: If not for the busy signal
text: I really wanted to like these headphones, in fact generally do like them. They have great sound quality for the price I paid, which is quite cheap and I wasn’t expecting too much, but thought it was better than what I expected. The microphone isn’t great, most people said I sounded muffled, but this isn’t what I bought them for. The Bluetooth range was impressive. I left my phone downstairs and the signal was still strong upstairs. I almost would have kept them minus a pretty big problem that was not occurring the first few days of having these. No matter what I listen to, Spotify, an audiobook on kindle, pandora — a busy tone like when you call someone and there’s no voicemail but just a beeping tone interrupts my audio every two to three minutes. I didn’t realize this has FM capabilities, but it really only picked up one station but it was fuzzy (again not the reason I purchased the headphones). So if it wasn’t for this weird thing going on with the audio, I would have rated them hig

title: Teen Wish
text: No complaints from the teen i gave it to . This us the most important thing.  Teen said ok, Yeah !!!!

title: Zihnic Wireless Headset
text: Lots of functions; comfortable, bluetooth capable, nice storage case, stereo sound, FM radio reception capable, storage card ability, recharable, both wired and wireless capabilities. This shipped emediately and was recieved the next day.

title: Terrible sound.  Muffled, low frequency bias
text: I bought this pair hoping it would be as good as my inexpensive MPOW set ... not even close.

title: Bluetooth headphones that fold and carry
text: I love these they are comfortable on my head and easy to charge. I have a Chromebook that does not have a jack for headphones. These are perfect.

title: Power light is too bright for me.
text:
Unfortunately, these are too bright. There’s a little blue power light that stays on while in use and is so bright you could use it as a flashlight. I need headphones so I could not be heard and seen. This light would wake someone, especially a light sleeping child up if laying next to them.

Sound is to be expected. Sounds kind of distant BUT CLEAR. That’s what I needed. I didn’t need a high quality sound. Wish when I was charging and setting up the functions weren’t so loud. Not sure if there was a way to turn that off or lower it. Could not find that information in manual.

They are comfortable around the ears and head. Overall, price for the product is fair/good.

title: Worth the money!
text: I love them! Very comfy and they look really nice! I tried them out and couldn't hear anything but the music which sounded great on blue tooth. The only that kinda threw me of the control buttons are on the back side of the right ear instead of them facing forward. Not a huge deal but still surprised me

title: Broke
text: The headphones broke after two weeks of use. Wouldn’t recommend.

title: Gift for Husband
text: He likes them. I like them more, so the TV isn't so loud while I try and sleep. He also uses with cell phone. Happy wife, happy life!

title: They work
text: I mean you can't ask for much with the price. But I'm shocked on how well they are. Not your average cheapo headphones for sure. I have 0 complants.

title: They work
text: I mean you can't ask for much with the price. But I'm shocked on how well they are. Not your average cheapo headphones for sure. I have 0 complants.

title: The sound quality on most stuff is barely even audible...
text: Unless whatever you are listening to is and loudly recorded type of audio you may regret buying this. There is no independent volume control on it. You have to use the controls of whatever you are listening to. I watched several hours of YouTube videos with it and you can barely make out the dialog even when your computer volume is maxed out. I tried it on my phone and got the same results. The actual product looks nice and it has a zippered case but unless you have supersonic hearing this is really not going to be a good purchase.

title: Great headphones
text: Bought two of these for my kids and then my girlfriend bought one right after.

title: Perfect gift
text: These are bad ass! I have purchased 6 pairs this year for adults and teens in the family because they are that awesome

title: Easy to work
text: These are easy to set up and the sound is great.

title: Nice for computer but don’t have the best phone connection
text: These are great for connecting to a laptop and listening to audio. They don’t work the best on phone calls though, with my voice cutting out a lot as I try to hold a conversation.

title: Yes, you want to buy these.
text: Love these. Great quality for the price. I wear them for the vast majority of the day, every day, and have for months now. I even sleep with them on most nights to block out my husband's snoring. 😂

title: Needed
text: I can’t give it a fair review as I don’t use them. But I can finally get some peace and quiet since I bought them priceless.

title: Cheaply made and loses sound to one side.
text:
1. Very cheaply made. The “cushion” as listed in description, is simply air between the liner and the plastic...no padding.
2. Sporadically loses sound out of one side of the headphones. Besides being quite annoying, this is a major manufacturer flaw...as I’ve only had them for a couple days.

title: Good headphones
text: I have had them for over a year and still work properly. They are comfortable enough to wear all day. Sound is good and good reach for when they are not closed to device.

title: Good sound even across the room
text:
I bought these headphones so I could listen to streaming video off of my computer even while I am across the room sewing. I do not have to have the volume up so loud to hear over the sewing machine and bother anyone else.
I also have hearing aids, so the bud type head sets would not work for me. These are very comfortable and hold a charge for at least 12 hours. I just plug them into my computer usb port each day when I am done in my sewing room.

title: Get what you pay for
text: When you buy headphones, you get what you pay for. What did you pay for these? Yeah, they're cheap, in every sense of the word. They haven't broken yet, but I can always hope.

title: Muffled Sound
text: I bought these during prime days. I have used them both as blue tooth connection and wired connect. The sound is not good. The music is muffled and I am not happy will be sending these back.

title: Easy to set-up with my TV
text: This headphones seem to be very comfortable and the sound is good

title: Good product
text: Can hear very good in them good sound

title: So comfortable!
text: These are the most comfortable headphones!  They fit around my ears perfectly without too much pressure.  A great product.

title: Easy to use but a little small
text: I wish they were slightly larger. But they are easy to use. They paired quickly and easily. And I have no problems switching them from linking wirelessly with my phone to plugging in the cord on my work computer. They also seem to hold a charge very well. I only use them about once a week, and they haven’t drained while I wasn’t in the office. Overall very pleased for the price

title: Great product, definitely recommend
text: These are great, they cover your whole ears without putting too much pressure on them I would most definitely recommend them for that feature alone. I also love that they come with a separate cord so you make them like regular headphones to connect to an older stereo or cd player

title: My Favorite
text: I love these headphones. They adjust to fit easily, great sound quality and comfortable on my ears. Very cushiony.

title: Great headphones...temporarily
text:
Great headphones and they come with a cool travel case

Update: after two months one side stopped working. Tried to contact the seller using the information from the product warranty and I have yet to receive an answer.

title: Bluetooth is faulty
text: These won't stay synced and result in choppy audio. The onboard controls don't work at all. Luckily, they've got a 3.5mm port, but the Bluetooth function is useless.

title: Great Headphones!!!  I highly recommend getting a pair!
text: These headphones are fantastic.  The sound quality is good but not amazing, but for the price of the headphones the sound quality is good.  I was really impressed with the battery life, at a full charge the battery lasts forever.  I'm sure you will not be disappointed with this purchase.

title: Cable sucks, bt headphones are nice for the price
text: Absolutely love them. The cable sucks tho. But when used wirelessly they are really. Ice for the price.

title: Disappointed
text:
So, I know these were inexpensive, and when I got them, I was pleasantly surprised at how decent they were. And they were a comfortable fit, which is hard for me to find.
But when the update came; can’t get it. They no longer pair.
Save yourself hassle, spend the money and get Beats.

title: Great buy
text: I wear these at the gym. They sound great, are comfortable, and the battery rarely needs charging.

title: Great Wireless Headset for the Price!
text: I was shocked how nice this headset was. It came in a hard zipper case with a usb cord and a jack cord. I bought it for myself to watch movies on my computer. I am going to buy one for my granddaughter for children. I didn't know how to connect it to my computer (my computer is still rocking and a-rolling even though its 12 years old), the instructions were for laptop, bluetooth, Iphone or android phone. So I contacted the chat line and I was walked thru every step of the way on how to connect the wireless headset to my desktop. It worked like a charm. Love the headset - I truly am thinking of getting one for each of my grandchildren and great grandchildren for Christmas.

title: Nice fit
text: They are comfortable with easy access to volume,on/off and call control.  Cute color for is girly girls....also durable and easy to pack into work tote.

title: Decent low end headphones
text:
Look better than they feel. The band area has material over it but there isn't padding between the material and the plastic. If your head is sensitive or you wear these a long time it probably will get uncomfortable. The ear padding is excellent, so I don't know why they skimped on band padding.

Sound wise, they're great for listening to music on my phone. But using my Roku app for private listening with my tv the sound is almost muffled. It's not as clear as listening to music or watching something on an app on my phone.

For calls it sounds like I'm far away, similar to how someone sounds on speakerphone. Defin9itely need to speak loudly to be heard well.

All that aside, they're really pretty, and I like the physical on/off switch and control buttons. I love that I can connect them when I don't want to be wireless. The case is great, it came with all the necessary cables, and a wrist strap for the case.

title: Great headset
text: So love this headset! Easy to put on. Sound quality is excellent and super easy to charge when dead. Totally recommend buying

title: Not for phone use
text: Sound is very muffled when using w iPhone

title: Work as expected
text: Did exactly what I expected, connected to my tablet first try with no issues, sound just fine. These are NOT noise canceling to any discernable degree, but I did not buy them for that purpose so was not expecting it, just confirming that is the case.

title: Impressed!!!!
text: I am really impressed by these headphones!! Cute little storage and they work pretty darn good for what I use them for. ( watching movies in bed :). ) For the sale price I veiled them for .... I’m very happy. The rose color is very pretty too!

title: Stopped working 1 month after receiving
text: Stopped working a month after purchase. Was used for elementary student online activities.  Left at school at all times.

title: It works, but seems muffled
text: The mid-range - voices - seem muffled. They are comfortable, charge lasts a good time, easy to pair.

title: HEADPHONES NOT WORKING IN LESS THAN ONE YEAR MINIMAL USE
text: This product was used for a child to listen to an iPad on long car trips. The child began using at school 9/2/22 and they ceased working 10/3/22.  this was purchased 11/21. Very disappointed! They look brand new!

title: Great quality
text: These earphones were selected by my granddaughter. She had to have them. They turned out to be a great gift. She loves them! She tells me they have a good listening quality. She uses them for her online studies. They have become part of her backpack must haves. They were a good price. If she likes them, I like them.

title: Great for kids
text: Great for long trips. Each kid has one and keeps them from complaining about hearing the others iPad. Makes for a peaceful trip. Bought one for one kid for Christmas last year and it’s worked great just had to grab another one for the rest of the kids.

title: I had trouble in the beginning with type of earphones.  Too small and uncomfortable.

title: For the cost, decent.
text: I use the SD card option, exclusively. The sound isn't great, but I have come to like it fine. Don't drop it, thpugh. It won't take much to smash it into pieces!  😣

title: Great
text: These work really well. Great value. Hold up really well so far. Daily use.

title: PERFECT!!
text: I can't hear anything unless it's right in front of me when I wear these -- I love them. The sound is lovely, and they're very comfy, even with my glasses on.

title: Great quality!
text: My husband loves them & uses them when he plays his drum set. Win win!

title: Good for Headphones, Not Mic
text: There isn't full noise cancellation, but I'm ok with that. That feature wasn't something I was looking for in headphones. I want to be able to hear my surroundings just in case something goes wrong. The sound quality when listening to music or podcasts is good. I wouldn't say it's state of the art, but it's good enough for me. I don't really use the volume control feature because I use it on my phone. The headphones are very easy to connect to Bluetooth. They connect seamlessly every time. The major problems I have with the headphones are two things. One problem is when I answer a phone call, the headphones buzz the whole entire time. I can only hear the sound. The person I am speaking to can't hear it. It is very distracting to me. The other problem is when I place a phone call, the person I am speaking with comes in clear, but I sound muffled to them. I read this same complaint from other people's reviews as well. I am keeping the headphones because I want to use them to listen to mu

title: Nope nope nope
text: Returned the first pair since they didn't work. They were replaced and broke again. You can't hear past the static, the wireless won't charge. Just a bad buy x2

title: Excelentes  Audífonos
text: Son excelentes,  a mi esposo le facinaron. Son super cómodos y tienen buena cancelación de sonido.

title: Adequate Headphones for the Price
text:
Great pair of headphones for folks on a budget.

They come in a variety of attractive colors; I bought think pink & white. I love that they're collapsible because headphones can be unwieldy. Comes with a sleek carrying case that includes a detachable wristband. The ear pillows are super soft, which is a huge plus - I can't stand uncomfortable headphones.

Sound quality leaves something to be desired but it's not terrible. Has nice deep bass. Noise canceling is decent.

Comes with a plethora of features such as FM radio, micro SD card slot, and Bluetooth. The FM radio is useless - it won't tune into any stations. Comes with a USB charging cable and stereo extension cable.

Overall, a nice pair of headphones for cheap. I definitely recommend these if you want to rock out I your own little world without throwing down a ton of money.

title: Light Headphones
text:
These look nice, light, and you can’t beat the price. Controls are nice and well designed.

For me the sound is tinny, lacking details and Bass. They routinely slipped off my ears/head during workouts.

title: Very happy
text: My husband is happy with these headphones.

title: Great for listening, unless you're near a microwave. Not great for talking.
text:
Great for listening, unless you're near a microwave. Not great for talking.

These things go crazy, 90s, AOL, booting up, if you're using them whilst cooking, and, god, forbid, have to use he microwave.

Also, I thought they came with a mic? No one can hear me. And it's a hassle to switch from the headphones to my phone speaker when I get a call. Please fix this glitch.

Love the color.

title: OK
text: Sound quality is not the best and if you get more than 10 ft from your device you lose connection.

title: Excellent quality
text: The sound is great, The quality is outstanding and it’s comfortable, affordable and  cute., what else can you ask for.

title: Work GREAT
text: I like the fact that  I can hear my computer and not disturb my husband when he watches tv

title: Extremely comfortable!
text: I like the comfort of the over the ear headphones.  I use the  headphones to listen to stories on an MP3 player.  The headphones do not totally cancel out the noise, but it works well to cancel out normal room noise.

title: Exceeded my expectations
text: These headphones, are very well thought out. All the right controls, easy pairing, perfect for my needs. I wanted wireless headphones, that did not go in the ears. These headphones, give me the safety of not having radiation going into my brain, wireless and a great price!

title: Broke after one week
text: Broke after a week/ my daughter was disappointed since she had used her own money to purchase. Would not recommend.

title: Work great for podcasts and phone calls; muddy sound quality for music, but fine for price point
text:
My old bluetooth earbuds took FOREVER to pair and were a daily headache. They also fell out constantly. So just about anything would've been an improvement.

These are TREMENDOUSLY better on the points that mattered to me:
- they pair with my phone in about 5 seconds, and then stay connected
- they're comfortable (though they can be a bit hot, since I usually wear them while walking and it's currently 90+ degrees)
- they stay put no matter what I'm doing (not that I'm doing extreme sports, but for ordinary walking, running, mowing the lawn, or doing chores around the house)
- they sound fine for podcasts and talking on the phone
- the microphone seems to work well for phone calls
- they block out enough sound, and have enough volume, that I haven't had any trouble hearing phone calls or podcasts over road noises
- the color (black and orange) is vivid; it looks just like the ad picture
- I've only had them a few days but the battery lif

title: These headphones were pretty ok
text: These headphones were alright. They just didn't fit my needs. I need headphones that can connect to multiple devices at a time, or at least allow me to pair to another device without having to disconnect from the previous device, and I couldn't do that with these. For the price point, these headphones were alright. The noice cancellation worked better than I thought, but the ear phone part, was round and I needed more of an oval or elongated ear ear muff to fit my ear. So I may have returned them anyway, even if the pairing did work. But as it is, I ended up sending them back and getting another pair, that ended up having the same issue. So, I may need to step up in price point in order to get this feature to work, but my previous headphones were in this same price bracket and paired with multiple devices with no problem. Unfortunately after 4 years, they stopped working but I definitely got my $$ worth out of them.

title: Good quality.
text: I used recently on a flight to Antigua. Works really good.

title: Great
text: These are super nice but didn’t cancel out the noise of my lawn mower

title: For now I'm great talk to me in a year and let's see well it is still working.
text: This work out to be a great Persian

title: pass.
text: The volume buttons also control other things, based on how long you hold it down.  They're awful.  I just use the controls on my phone.  The sound is slightly tinny and very echoey. Deep and muddled. I wish i had bought different pair.  To be fair i listen mostly to audio books and podcasts.  Theyre awful.  The noise cancellation is a myth.  I can still hear all the noises im trying to avoid in my office.

title: Great!
text: I got a second pair of these headphones after i got a pair for my husband to use while playing on his PS4. Easy to pair on bluetooth, excellent noise cancellation, beautiful sound quality.

title: MicroSD card slot and FM radio
text: I wanted a headphone that supports microSD card playback to extend battery life on the BT source and the headphone itself. This product appears sturdy. The sound is excellent for my needs. The tracks play in sequence, but you can jump, no shuffle mode, which is fine with me. It's great freedom to walk around without having to think about being too far from the BT source, which is the main reason I bought this unit. FM stations can be chosen using light presses on the volume button, which also applies to skipping tracks in microSD card mode. Long presses on the volume button adjust the sound level. Overall, if you have the same needs as me, I wouldn't hesitate to buy this product. It's worth the price for this niche product.

title: Great customer service. Refunded right away.
text: It didn't work. I charged it up fully per instructions. Couldn't connect to my tv or phone. I sentvl it back. They refunded my money the same day.

title: They don't connect to a Bluetooth TV.
text: I bought these headphones to connect to a Bluetooth Sony TV and they do not connect! They work good with my phone, tablet and computer but I cannot connect them to my Bluetooth TVs. Irritataing!

title: Wireless headset
text: These are very nice for listening to the TV without disturbing others.  Because the sound is right next to my ears, the dialogue is easier for me to understand.  My only real complaint is not particular to these headphones.  There is a volume limit on them that, as my hearing gets poorer, won't be loud enough.  They are a little difficult to figure out how to connect them, but it's not too bad.  They don't automatically re-connect when the TV is turned off and then back on.  There is a bit of a fiddle to connect them, but they work fine, and once I figured out the fiddle, it isn't difficult..

title: Couldn't be happier with my purchase
text: I thought these headphones for my daughter as a Christmas gift. They arrived in an Amazon box and inside that box was the beautiful rose gold colored case wrapped in bubble wrap. The color is absolutely beautiful and my daughter couldn't be happier with the earphones key. She likes to watch a lot of YouTube videos on her computer and she says they were great, the sound is clear and they do cancel out extra noise. I couldn't be happier with the purchase and I will definitely be a repeat customer.

title: Good Value with Great Sound
text: These have a beautiful sound and work perfectly. Really glad I ordered them. They're very comfortable, and pretty as well. Comes with nice case. Good value.

title: Understand.
text: I understand that you get what you pay for. And with that being said. These worked fine. Case was nice. Easy to connect. Comfortable on your head. Sound quality was average. Not great but average. But I also didn't want to pay $200+.

title: Good buy for money.
text: Got these today...the bass is amazing! I gave 4 stars because the control buttons take a while to get used to...but then I've only had them for a few hours.
